allow: PowerShell(winget --version; Get-CimInstance Win32_VideoController | Select-Object Name, AdapterRAM; $d = Get-PSDrive C; "Free: {0:N1} GB" -f \($d.Free/1GB\))

PowerShell($rel = Invoke-RestMethod "https://api.github.com/repos/comfyanonymous/ComfyUI/releases/latest"; $rel.tag_name; $rel.assets | Select-Object name, @{n="MB";e={[math]::Round\($_.size/1MB\)}}, browser_download_url | Format-List)

PowerShell(New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force "C:\\Users\\dgohd\\Tools" | Out-Null; curl.exe -L -o "C:\\Users\\dgohd\\Tools\\ComfyUI_portable.7z" "https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI/releases/download/v0.27.0/ComfyUI_windows_portable_nvidia.7z" --silent --show-error; "Download done: " + \("{0:N0} MB" -f \(\(Get-Item "C:\\Users\\dgohd\\Tools\\ComfyUI_portable.7z"\).Length/1MB\)\))

PowerShell($rel = Invoke-RestMethod "https://api.github.com/repos/ephtracy/ephtracy.github.io/releases"; $rel | ForEach-Object { $_.tag_name; $_.assets | Select-Object -ExpandProperty name } | Select-Object -First 15)

PowerShell($b = Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\Blender Foundation" -Recurse -Filter "blender.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName; "Path: $b"; & $b --version | Select-Object -First 2)

PowerShell(Move-Item "C:\\Users\\dgohd\\Downloads\\Materialize_1.78" "C:\\Users\\dgohd\\Tools\\Materialize"; Test-Path "C:\\Users\\dgohd\\Tools\\Materialize\\Materialize.exe"; Get-Content "C:\\Users\\dgohd\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\C--Users-dgohd-practiceAI\\36c23b9b-0127-49f9-9fde-be1c3d671840\\tasks\\bchoixn3n.output"; "Disk free: {0:N1} GB" -f \(\(Get-PSDrive C\).Free/1GB\))

PowerShell($ok = $false; foreach \($i in 1..30\) { Start-Sleep 2; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "http://127.0.0.1:8188/system_stats" -TimeoutSec 2; $ok = $true; break } catch {} }; if \($ok\) { "ComfyUI UP"; $r.devices | Select-Object name, type, @{n="vram_GB";e={[math]::Round\($_.vram_total/1GB,1\)}} } else { "not up yet" })

PowerShell(Add-Content -Path "C:\\Users\\dgohd\\.claude\\projects\\C--Users-dgohd-practiceAI\\memory\\MEMORY.md" -Value "- [UE preference]\(ue-preference.md\) — UEを応援したい意向。新規開発はUE5.8+公式MCP軸で" -Encoding utf8; $l = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\Epic Games\\Launcher\\Portal\\Binaries\\Win64\\EpicGamesLauncher.exe", "${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Epic Games\\Launcher\\Portal\\Binaries\\Win64\\EpicGamesLauncher.exe"\) | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ }; if \($l\) { "Epic Launcher installed: $l" } else { "Epic Launcher not installed" })

PowerShell($shell = New-Object -ComObject Shell.Application; $rb = $shell.Namespace\(0xA\); $items = @\($rb.Items\(\)\); "合計 " + $items.Count + " 件"; $items | ForEach-Object { [PSCustomObject]@{ Name = $_.Name; Size = $rb.GetDetailsOf\($_, 3\); DeletedDate = $rb.GetDetailsOf\($_, 2\); OrigPath = $rb.GetDetailsOf\($_, 1\) } } | Sort-Object Name | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String -Width 200)
PowerShell(Clear-RecycleBin -DriveLetter C -Force -Confirm:$false -ErrorAction Stop; "Emptied"; "Disk free: {0:N1} GB" -f \(\(Get-PSDrive C\).Free/1GB\))

PowerShell(try { Clear-RecycleBin -Force -Confirm:$false -ErrorAction Stop } catch { $_.Exception.Message }; Start-Sleep 3; "Disk free: {0:N1} GB" -f \(\(Get-PSDrive C\).Free/1GB\); $shell = New-Object -ComObject Shell.Application; "残り件数: " + @\($shell.Namespace\(0xA\).Items\(\)\).Count)

PowerShell($l = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\Epic Games\\Launcher\\Portal\\Binaries\\Win64\\EpicGamesLauncher.exe", "${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Epic Games\\Launcher\\Portal\\Binaries\\Win64\\EpicGamesLauncher.exe"\) | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ } | Select-Object -First 1; if \($l\) { Start-Process $l; "Launcher started: $l" } else { "Launcher exe not found" })
